SourceProxy.name: SHYXHoleFillFilter
SourceProxy.label: SHYX Hole Fill (CGAL)

Documentation.short_help: Fill holes (or a selected patch) on vtkPolyData using CGAL PMP.

SourceProxy.Documentation: Fills mesh boundary cycles with CGAL triangulate_refine_and_fair_hole (same pipeline as vtkCGALPatchFilling). Optional Selection removes triangles or points first (e.g. to open a tunnel or delete a patch). Input should be a manifold triangle mesh where possible; output replaces the surface including new fill triangles.

InputProperty.name: Selection
InputProperty.Documentation: Optional selection: removed from the mesh before filling (same semantics as VESPA hole filling).

IntVectorProperty.name: FairingContinuity
IntVectorProperty.label: Fairing Continuity
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Tangential continuity of the filled patch: 0 = C0 / planar-style filling, 1 = C1, 2 = C2 (CGAL fairing_continuity).
